basic_details.job_title: ECHS Sri Ganganagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Female Attendant, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Staff in ECHS Polyclinic posts! Published through the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 8 vacancies for eligible candidates. Applicants with qualifications such as 8th Pass, Literate, Diploma, GNM, Graduate, MBBS, BDS, or D Pharma (as per post) can apply offline up to 06 June 2026. Find all details about the ECHS Sri Ganganagar Recruitment 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, BDS, D Pharma, GNM, Diploma Holder in Dental, Literate
qualification.details: Officer-in-Charge (Only for ESM): Graduate + 05 Yrs experience Medical Officer: MBBS + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Officer: BDS + 03 Yrs Experience Pharmacist: D Pharma + Registered Pharmacist + 03 Yrs Experience Nursing Assistant: GNM + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: Diploma Holder in Dental + 05 Yrs Experience Ambulance Driver: 8th pass + 05 yrs experience Female Attendant: Literate + Minimum 5 years experience

salary_details.details: Officer-in-Charge (Only for ESM): Rs. 95,000/- Medical Officer: Rs. 95,000/- Dental Officer: Rs. 95,000/- Pharmacist: Rs. 36,500/- Nursing Assistant: Rs. 36,500/- Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: Rs. 36,500/- Ambulance Driver: Rs. 25,600/- Female Attendant: Rs. 21,800/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Sri Ganganagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Sri Ganganagar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ECHS Sri Ganganagar recruitment is 06 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this ECHS Sri Ganganagar recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies available for various staff positions in ECHS Polyclinic Sri Ganganagar and Hanumangarh as part of this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ECHS Sri Ganganagar recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via speed post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the highest salary offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The highest salary offered for the Officer-in-Charge, Medical Officer, and Dental Officer positions is Rs. 95,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for any post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Female Attendant post is being literate, and for the Ambulance Driver post, it is an 8th pass with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for this ECHS Sri Ganganagar recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for staff on a contractual basis for 11 months, as indicated in the brief description of the advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent in hard copies through speed post to ECHS Cell, Station HQs, Sri Ganganagar Pin 900291 and Civil Pin Code 335001 C/o 56 APO.

faq.question: Q9. What are the eligibility criteria for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have at least 05 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview for the selected candidates is tentatively scheduled for June 2026. Specific dates will be communicated to the shortlisted candidates.
